## Project-Specific Rules
- Modify only header and sidebar styling in DashboardShell:
  - Implement curvy/rounded visuals
  - Add hover effects on navigation buttons
  - Create a pill-style theme toggle with dark default and light variant
- Keep content panel as dummy; no content changes required.
